title: VimFu — Recipe: Extract Matching Lines
description: Use :v/pattern/d to delete all lines that don't match, keeping only the lines you want.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with mixed content

setup.content:
setup database
TODO: fix login bug
write tests
TODO: add validation
deploy server
TODO: update docs
clean temp files
run benchmarks
TODO: refactor API

steps.say: This file mixes tasks with TODO items. Let's extract just the TODO lines and discard everything else.
Colon v is the inverse of g. It matches lines that don't contain the pattern, then deletes them.
Only the four TODO lines remain. Everything else is gone.
Colon v pattern d. Keep matching lines, delete the rest. The opposite of g pattern d.
